summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of UnifyBricks landing page with 5 new sections. All new sections render correctly and function as expected. Interactive elements (accordion, contact form, payout selection) work perfectly. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: Navbar renders with updated links (Features, Industries, Solutions, About, Log in, Get Started)
Hero section renders with 3D globe, heading, CTAs, floating badges
TrustedBy section shows industry pills (Airlines, E-Commerce, SaaS, Marketplaces, Hospitality, Logistics, FinTech) + company marquee
Platform Capabilities bento grid with 4 cards verified
MobileExperience section - left text with golden bullet points, right phone mockup with $125,000.00 payment status and progress bar
WhyChoose section - heading with 99.9% Uptime SLA and 24/7 Support stats, accordion with 3 expandable items works correctly
UseCases section - 'Built for your industry' heading with 4 industry cards (E-Commerce, SaaS & Tech, Marketplaces, Supply Chain & Logistics)
PayoutMethods section - 'Multiple ways to deliver funds' with 4 method cards and interactive phone mockup with 'Confirm Selection' button
ContactForm section - 'Ready to get started?' with benefits checklist and functional form (shows 'Thank you!' on submission)
Accordion in WhyChoose section expands/collapses on click
Contact form fields are interactive and form submits successfully
No dark text on dark background issues detected
All sections render correctly on desktop and mobile viewports
